positive_description: Extremely subtle deformation. At +3.0, visually indistinguishable from neutral in all views.
negative_description: Extremely subtle deformation. At -3.0, visually indistinguishable from neutral.
symmetry_notes: Indeterminate. Cannot be assessed from renders at these weights.
artifact_notes: No mesh artifacts at +/-3.0. Safe well beyond tested range.
useful_for: micro-texture in expression blends at very high weights
prose: Psi27 is deep in the expression PCA tail. All seven renders are visually indistinguishable from the neutral face. At this point in the PCA ordering, the component captures a minuscule fraction of training-set expression variance. The deformation is sub-pixel at standard render conditions, making visual characterization impossible. Whatever micro-expression or subject-specific residual this component encodes, it is functionally inert for Sarasti's crisis-to-face mapping.
